summary: Frontend i18n testing completed. Translations are working correctly for most pages (Home, Bible, Community, Forum, Profile). Found 2 issues: 1) Settings page language change doesn't update global language store immediately, 2) Radio page has hardcoded Italian continent names instead of using translations.

ui_bugs.issue: Language change doesn't update global language store immediately. The Settings page uses local state (setLanguageState) instead of calling useLanguageStore().setLanguage() when language is changed. Translations only update after page refresh or navigation.
Continent filter names are hardcoded in Italian (CONTINENTS array lines 31-38). Should use t() function with translation keys: europe, southAmerica, northAmerica, africa, asia, oceania

action_items: Fix Settings page to call useLanguageStore().setLanguage() when language is changed, not just on save
Update Radio page CONTINENTS array to use translation keys instead of hardcoded Italian names
critical_code_review_comments: languageStore.ts: Translation system is well implemented with ~200 keys for 6 languages
bible.tsx: Correctly uses useTranslation() hook for all UI text
community.tsx: Correctly uses useTranslation() hook for all UI text
forum.tsx: Correctly uses useTranslation() hook for all UI text
settings.tsx: Uses useTranslation() but language change only updates local state, not global store
radio.tsx: Uses useTranslation() but CONTINENTS array has hardcoded Italian names

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Most translations working, 2 minor issues found

context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n testing completed. Translation system in languageStore.ts is working correctly with ~200 keys for 6 languages (it, es, en, pt, fr, de). Pages tested: Home, Bible, Community, Forum, Radio, Settings, Profile. Two issues found: 1) Settings page language change doesn't immediately update global store - needs to call setLanguage() from useLanguageStore, 2) Radio page has hardcoded Italian continent names in CONTINENTS array. All other translations are working correctly.

pages_tested.home: PASS - All translations working (Buongiorno, Versetto del Giorno, Azioni Rapide, etc.)
pages_tested.bible: PASS - All translations working (La Bibbia, capitoli, etc.)
pages_tested.community: PASS - All translations working (Community, Connettiti con fratelli, Originale, etc.)
pages_tested.forum: PASS - All translations working (Forum Comunitario, Tutti, Nessun post ancora, etc.)
pages_tested.radio: PARTIAL - Most translations working but continent names hardcoded in Italian
pages_tested.settings: PARTIAL - Translations working but language change doesn't update immediately
pages_tested.profile: PASS - All translations working (Funzionalità, Impostazioni, Esci, etc.)

translation_keys_verified: read, write, community, settings, profile, bible, journal
